briefdescription.para: Get an interrupt controller node's level base ISR table offset.

parameterdescription.para: node identifier of the interrupt controller

simplesect.para: CONFIG_2ND_LVL_ISR_TBL_OFFSET if node_id is a second level aggregator, CONFIG_3RD_LVL_ISR_TBL_OFFSET if it is a third level aggregator

briefdescription.para: Get the SW ISR table offset for an instance of interrupt controller.

parameterdescription.para: DT_DRV_COMPAT interrupt controller driver instance number

simplesect.para: Software ISR table offset of the interrupt controller

briefdescription.para: Get the SW ISR table offset for a child interrupt controller.

detaileddescription.para: This macro is a alternative form of the INTC_INST_ISR_TBL_OFFSET. This is used by pseudo interrupt controller devices that are child of a main interrupt controller device.

parameterdescription.para: node identifier of the child interrupt controller

simplesect.para: Software ISR table offset of the child

briefdescription.para: Register an interrupt controller with the software ISR table.

parameterdescription.para: Name of the interrupt controller (must be unique)
Pointer to the interrupt controller device instance
Software ISR table offset of the interrupt controller

briefdescription.para: This interrupt gets put directly in the vector table.

detaileddescription.para: Data types for a software-managed ISR table, with a parameter per-ISR.
